raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent output thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing detailed critiques and suggestions for improvement.",
    "R1.4": "The agent output maps against the nearest 3-5 works, identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta and providing a comprehensive assessment of the related work.",
    "R1.7": "The agent output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides detailed critiques of the citations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear and transparent assessment of the uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), staying within scope and avoiding drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original text and provides suggestions for improvement, demonstrating a strong commitment to downstream-harm avoidance.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, providing a clear and transparent record of the revisions."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.95,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent output thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing detailed critiques and suggestions for improvement.
rationale.R1.4: The agent output maps against the nearest 3-5 works, identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta and providing a comprehensive assessment of the related work.
rationale.R1.7: The agent output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides detailed critiques of the citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear and transparent assessment of the uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), staying within scope and avoiding drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original text and provides suggestions for improvement, demonstrating a strong commitment to downstream-harm avoidance.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, providing a clear and transparent record of the revisions.
